name: NPC
description: Adds information about the NPC (person details, occupation, faction, background, etc.)

name: NpcMemory
description: Adds a summary of previous interactions between the NPC and the player from NPC memory.

name: Player
description: Adds detailed information about the one and only J.S. This includes the custom character background if present.

name: MarketLore
description: Adds information about the current market (Size, industries, status, etc.)

name: MarketEconomy
description: Adds information bout the open market when present on the planet.

name: MarketMilitary
description: Adds details about the colonies military strength and buildings.

name: FactionLore
description: Adds publicly available information about the known factions of the Sector.

name: BaseSystemInstruction
description: Adds instructions for the llm about the context and how to respond.

name: GuardrailsInstruction
description: Adds guardrails to keep the experience close to T-rated.
